summary: Sensor provider fixes and UI refinement with no tuning/write expansion.

cpu_metric_behavior.temperature: 0 C is invalid_value and unavailable for headline/card use
cpu_metric_behavior.power: 0 W with nonzero CPU load is stale_zero/unavailable
cpu_metric_behavior.clock: 0 MHz with nonzero CPU load is stale_zero/unavailable
cpu_metric_behavior.voltage: valid when in reasonable CPU voltage range

ui_changes: CPU hero can use CPU load as primary when temperature is unavailable
raw explorer includes validity, validity reason, provider, and subcategory
Dashboard and Settings show Phase 8 provider status

latest_live_snapshot.cpu_temp_unavailable_reason: Core (Tctl/Tdie) reported 0 C and was rejected as invalid.
